name: wren-engine
description: AI agent skills for Wren Engine — semantic SQL layer and MCP server for 20+ data sources.

skills.name: wren-connection-info
skills.description: Reference guide for Wren Engine connection info — required fields for all 18 data sources, sensitive field handling, Docker host hints, and credential encoding.

skills.name: wren-generate-mdl
skills.description: Generate a Wren MDL manifest from a live database using MCP server introspection tools.

skills.name: wren-project
skills.description: Save, load, and build Wren MDL manifests as YAML project directories for version control.

skills.name: wren-sql
skills.description: Write and correct SQL queries targeting Wren Engine — types, date/time, BigQuery dialect, error diagnosis.

skills.name: wren-mcp-setup
skills.description: Set up Wren Engine MCP server via Docker and register it with an AI agent.

skills.name: wren-quickstart
skills.description: End-to-end quickstart for Wren Engine — from zero to querying.

skills.name: wren-http-api
skills.description: Interact with Wren Engine MCP server via plain HTTP JSON-RPC requests — no MCP client SDK required.

skills.name: wren-usage
skills.description: Wren Engine — semantic SQL engine for AI agents. Query 22+ data sources through a modeling layer. Main entry point for setup, SQL, MDL generation, and MCP server operations.
